subcodes.first_line: O thou who art gazing toward Abdul-Baha! Now I address thee with a heart filled... Arise to serve the Cause of God in the vineyard of God
subcodes.subjects: @Mary Magdalene, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @the human soul, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @role and station of women, @suffering and imprisonment
